flows.name: List Flows
flows.summary: Lists all flows in the environment with status and metadata.

flows.name: Search Flows
flows.summary: Search flows by name, trigger type, or connected connector.

flows.name: List Environments
flows.summary: Browse available Power Platform environments for flow operations.

flows.name: Get Flow Definition
flows.summary: Retrieve the full flow definition including triggers, actions, and conditions.

flows.name: Action Details
flows.summary: Show detailed information about a specific flow action including inputs and outputs.

flows.name: Trigger Details
flows.summary: Show trigger configuration and connection details for a flow.

flows.name: Run History
flows.summary: View run history, status, and execution times for a flow.

flows.name: Run Status
flows.summary: Check the current status of a specific flow run.

flows.name: Metrics Summary
flows.summary: Aggregated metrics for flow runs including success rate, average duration, and failure count.

flows.name: Trigger Flow
flows.summary: Trigger a flow run with optional input parameters.

flows.name: Resubmit Run
flows.summary: Resubmit a failed or cancelled flow run.

flows.name: Get Errors
flows.summary: Retrieve detailed error information for failed flow runs.

flows.name: Troubleshoot Run
flows.summary: Analyze a failed run and provide troubleshooting suggestions.

flows.name: Connection Check
flows.summary: Validate connector connections used by a flow.

flows.name: Policy Check
flows.summary: Run DLP and governance policy checks against a flow definition.

flows.name: Compliance Scan
flows.summary: Scan flows for compliance with organizational policies and standards.

flows.name: Risk Assessment
flows.summary: Assess security and operational risk of a flow configuration.
